lessons.title: Multiple-Film Techniques
objectives: Apply multiple-film techniques to thickness variation problems
Select film speed and latitude combinations for multi-film exposures

lessons.title: Enlargement, Projection, and Geometric Relationships
objectives: Relate geometric unsharpness, IQI sensitivity, source-to-film distance, and focal spot size

lessons.title: Triangulation, Localized Magnification, and Film Handling
objectives: Use triangulation methods to locate discontinuity depth
Apply localized magnification and proper film handling techniques during evaluation
